data.content: The file is generated successfully but never added to the compilation. The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes the `.cs` file but doesn't include it in the `Compile` item group, so Roslyn never sees it.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it doesn't add the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The MSBuild `Compile` items are already collected before the target runs, so the generated file isn't included in compilation.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, using `<ItemGroup>` with `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />`.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's what was wrong:

**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target generated `GeneratedInfo.cs` into the intermediate output directory, but never added it to the `<Compile>` item group. MSBuild collects source files before custom targets run, so the generated file was invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Added a `<Compile Include="..." />` item inside the target so the generated file is included in compilation after it's written.
